title: oxystophyllum capitellatum
intro: Oxystophyllum capitellatum, also known as the mountain orchid, is a species of orchid native to the tropical regions of Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Oxystophyllum capitellatum include its potential to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Oxystophyllum capitellatum typically involve the roots and flowers, which can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
